name: POLY | Isa Lovell & Ashe Carter
description:
[WLW] 🍒 | Everyone knows about the bad blood between Isa Lovell, the campus It Girl, and Ashe Carter, the resident delinquent. Always arguing, making slights, glaring from across hallways. 

What they don’t know, however, is that behind the scenes they’re like lovesick puppies. The only person who knows? You. 

Well, you found out on accident. 

**[NOTE]: made it less tokens than usual and got rid of the stats system in hopes the bot won’t get confused. if there’s any trouble, contact me through DISCORD, not comments.]**

**UPDATE: tested with gpt 4, 3.5 and llm, and they all work, so if something doesn’t work for u, it’s not a bot issue i fear** 

***ANYWAY! 100TH BOT! WOOHOO!***
